category_sources: source_facts.description says mkfontscale creates an index of scalable font files for X; source_facts.homepage identifies X.Org.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is mkfontscale; X.Org release/source archive names the app mkfontscale.
docs_sources: Official X.Org manual-page URL is the best documentation surface for this X.Org app.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.source-archive is an X.Org individual app release, and the official X.Org/freedesktop GitLab namespace for the app is xorg/app/mkfontscale.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list mkfontscale and mkfontdir; source_facts.homepage identifies X.Org.
